title: alyssum minus var. micranthum
intro: Alyssum minus var. micranthum, also known as dwarf alyssum or creeping alyssum, is a low-growing, annual or perennial flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a demulcent, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of alyssum minus var. micranthum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Alyssum minus var. micranthum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
